IVKINK LIVE RUN COMPLETE (workflow wf_3588bc63, 5 agents, raw quotes archived to scratchpad + recompute files). RAW verdicts: OGN UNRELIABLE (1 usable expiry), IPCX NO_CHAIN (no listed options), EQH UNPRICED 1.1888, CRBG UNPRICED 1.0168, AXTA UNPRICED 1.0848. ADVERSARIAL FINDING (agent notes): the pair-level bid gate blended zero-bid degenerate-IV legs (EQH Jul-17 put IV 0.000224, delta -1) into real call IVs, halving the front point and MANUFACTURING the EQH kink. CODE FIXED same session (commit 19b71f1, per-leg admission: own bid + IV >= 1%; suite 1915 green, floor file untouched, not on order-path manifest). FIXED-GATE recompute from the same raw quotes: OGN UNRELIABLE (0 usable expiries - dead chain), EQH UNPRICED 1.0118 (false kink GONE), CRBG UNPRICED 1.0168, AXTA UNPRICED 1.0848 (Jul-17 dropped, verdict resting on call-only zeroth interval). Integrity note: the screen verdict semantics were never traded on; the fix tightened admission only.

DOCTRINE LESSON (playbook update this session): announced cash-merger targets are the WRONG supply for the ivkink screen - a category error. Their event risk is priced in the EQUITY SPREAD (OGN 13.53 vs $14.00 offer, ~3.5%), not the vol surface; their ATM chains are functionally dead (volume 0 on all 26 ATM contracts checked across OGN/EQH/CRBG/AXTA at 14:10-14:16 UTC, OI single digits, MM-quote spreads like AXTA 33C 0.05/3.90 = 77x the gate-5 ceiling). A letter-of-the-law UNPRICED on a dead chain is not a harvestable mispricing: gate 5 (liquidity) pre-fails every candidate. The kink screen needs UNDATED NON-MERGER events with LIVE chains (Federal Register/ITC dockets, extensions, financing deadlines) - the DEFM14A merger-vote channel stays useful only as an aim for OTHER structures (spread/tender mechanics), not long options. Eventfeed correction applied: CRBD -> CRBG (2 rows).

VERDICT: the in-session one-shot cron mechanism is REFUTED for ephemeral session containers - a cron scheduled inside a session dies with the sessions container and can never serve as an art. 4 verified wake. Consequence (charter art. 4): verified wakes must be operator-provisioned market-hours Routines (like this daily one) or an equivalent mechanism proven end-to-end; until one exists, EVERY entry is sized to the blind unattended worst case - which proteus.schema already enforces via worst_case.basis. No position depended on this experiment (0 open). Kill-spec-style closure: leg 2 (an operator-provisioned wake) is NOT scheduled today - the daily Routine already guarantees a next-session fire, and no open position has a typed kill condition that can mature between daily sessions.

text: STAGED PROCESS ROUND TRIP GRADED (art. 16, mechanics - excluded from trade calibration/ladders). Leg 1 HIT: review_equity_order dry-run clean (order_checks {}). Leg 2 HIT: buy 6a54f7d2 filled in 0.16s at avg 752.26 = 0.05% BELOW the 752.64 placement ask (inside the 0.5% bound). Leg 3 MISS AS WRITTEN, path clean: predicted quantity = dollar_amount/avg_price ROUNDED to 6dp (0.006647); broker TRUNCATES to 6dp (0.006646). The ledger row appended and LiveBook.enter debited exactly the fill dollars ($4.99951996), so the path itself is correct - the miss is my arithmetic assumption. PROCESS LESSON, permanent: Robinhood dollar-based orders truncate share quantity at 6 decimal places, never round. Leg 4 HIT: sell 6a54f825 filled in 0.10s at 752.0786; LiveBook.exit credited proceeds exactly ($4.99831545). Realized P&L: -$0.0012 (the spread, the honest cost of the lesson); tax: short-term, estimated $0.00 at 24%.
